theme_strategy.description: A mobile-first, high-contrast design emphasizing clarity. Strips away decorative elements to focus entirely on user actions (check-in/out) and map visibility. Driven by mathematical grid alignment and generous typography.

cards.description: Go cardless where possible. When cards are needed for grouping data (like the Today's Status), use sharp 1px borders without drop shadows to maintain the Swiss aesthetic.

primary.interaction: Opacity shifts to 0.8 on active press

check_in_cta.description: Massive circular or rounded-rect hero button on the dashboard for staff to check in.

inputs.style: Minimalistic bottom-border only, or strictly outlined.

login.layout: Vertical stack, generous top spacing (e.g., pt-32). Brand title in Work Sans H1. Clean email/password inputs.

staff_dashboard.layout: Grid/Stack layout. Top: User greeting & current date. Middle: Massive Check-in / Check-out CTA. Bottom: Bento-style summary of today's hours and last known location snippet.
staff_dashboard.gps_indicator: Use a subtle pulsing green dot for 'Location Active'.

attendance_history.layout: Edge-to-edge list view. High-contrast typography for timestamps. Date filter sticky at the top.

map_view.layout: Full screen map or 60% map / 40% bottom sheet. Plotting pins for check-in and check-out coordinates.

admin_dashboard.layout: Dense control-room style. Top horizontal scroll for office locations. Vertical list for real-time staff status.

map_placeholder.description: Placeholder for static map views before actual Maps SDK renders.

testing_attributes.instructions: All touchable elements, form inputs, and key UI markers MUST use standard React Native `testID` props (equivalent to data-testid). Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., testID='check-in-submit-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo application. Adapt the provided design metrics (sizes in px, colors in hex) to StyleSheet objects or NativeWind classes if configured.
Do NOT use HTML elements (like <div> or <input>). Use React Native primitives (<View>, <Text>, <TextInput>, <TouchableOpacity>).
For icons, use @expo/vector-icons (Feather or Phosphor icons preferred to match the minimalist Swiss vibe).
Ensure all maps use a desaturated / silver JSON style config for Google Maps/Apple Maps to match the minimal aesthetic.
Never use raw transparent backgrounds for text-bearing headers.
Prioritize optical alignment and generous padding (minimum 24px container padding) to let elements breathe.
